textByHash.9e6b7fb68db57895a38b60cc013dbe4906e6288b: Maybe... who is asking? You're an outerlander, aren't you?
textByHash.553c1dc7713b446c5960260357695a33b01ffcd6: I haven't actually been in Rellekka yet...
textByHash.61f91fc786e21598fb2f3fbe78bb9f98bfdebecd: Well, I'm not actually sure if I should go in there, you see.
textByHash.ff74d50e9100dd04f883e99fa4e8f1d9b802469d: I've always been told that the people of Rellekka are ignorants, almost as bad as other outerlanders. I think they might kill me if I go there.
textByHash.3bde8a44752fe1488a3566364a5dc84202be8d17: Yes, but you're on your own, they have a whole village.
textByHash.f9abdd302e6903de3dae0cd289a129973669806c: So I don't want to go in there, but I don't want to go back to the camp and tell Hamal that I didn't dare to go to Rellekka either.
textByHash.58c86e4f7f59e8d2a420672feeda714f093d1a49: Not all of us are warriors.
textByHash.111f1a8b21fd08e43c6aa59c07a4a833295be846: Some of us are schooled in the fine art of diplomacy.
textByHash.d302c5dd6a8fbbbb2a73566941dc0ae8d09e77c2: I won't go in there unless I know it's safe.
textByHash.8506dc96ab3502ef76a90dfcf939152a5224b52f: You? But you're an outerlander! You'd probably lead me to a cave to kill me yourself!
textByHash.475ddb7e0b49ee90d6c2f9b0e26bb5cdeab673c5: Weren't you on your way to get me a guarantee of safe passage into Rellekka?
textByHash.822dc7d3275501070b9200c7290e8a9e95c557b2: In that case I'm staying right here. I don't have the authority to trade away our rock.
textByHash.e600cea47f8170950acb4fb7e2d5a49716413d0e: Besides, it's ours and he can't have it.
textByHash.e9187583fc8266140a4e4735a38872f8ad8d834e: Let me see that, I want to be sure it's authentic.
textByHash.351ec1bcd6ab46cc7ed8df13c45cd0702ddb52d0: Okay, this looks valid enough. I'll go and talk to Brundt.
textByHash.88dae9539b354b33ce568f4f71fa7cc674fbe12e: None of your business! Leave me alone!
textByHash.ce78e41c61cb623f5c4a1d6dd5193829610fc54c: No I'm not! Now leave me alone!
textByHash.501bafba55fe164a7055ed2fdcd59e7fba63354e: I'm now the official liaison between Rellekka and our camp. It involves a fair bit of walking around, you know.
